registries.name: Glama

registries.name: PulseMCP
registries.last_attempt_detail: PulseMCP does NOT accept direct submissions — they crawl Anthropic Registry + npm + awesome-mcp. We're on all three; will surface on their next index pass (typ. 1-7 days).
